title: QA Dual Spine Unification Report — FAIL: obstruction_spine_ref points to cert not report
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: obstruction_spine_ref is QA_OBSTRUCTION_STACK_CERT.v1 (the synthesis cert) instead of QA_OBSTRUCTION_STACK_REPORT.v1 (the validated report). This is a realistic mistake — confusing the synthesis cert [115] with the reader-facing report [116]. Validator fires DU1: OBSTRUCTION_SPINE_REF_MISMATCH.
obstruction_theorem: For any QA modulus m=p^k with p inert in Z[phi], the p-adic valuation v_p(r)=1 is a complete arithmetic obstruction: every such target is unreachable, every obstruction-aware planner prunes it before search, and the pruning_ratio equals 1.0.
control_theorem: The QA plan-control compiler law is domain-generic: orbit singularity→satellite→cosmos and path_length_k=2 are preserved across physically distinct domains under the same kernel-governed generator algebra.

comparison_table.canonical_pass_witness_summary: r=6, p=3, k=2: forbidden, planner prunes, nodes_expanded=0, pruning_ratio=1.0
comparison_table.canonical_fail_witness_summary: r=6 obstruction declared but planner expanded 12 nodes: PRUNING_CONCLUSION_MISMATCH
comparison_table.what_is_recomputed: v_p(r), pruned flag, saved_nodes, pruning_ratio from arithmetic params

comparison_table.canonical_theorem: orbit singularity→satellite→cosmos and k=2 preserved across domains
comparison_table.canonical_fail_witness_summary: seismology claims orbit ends in satellite: COMPARISON_TABLE_MISMATCH
comparison_table.what_is_recomputed: orbit_path uniformity, path_length_k uniformity across comparison_table rows

synthesis_statement: QA is a kernel-governed system with two interacting public spines. The obstruction spine governs impossibility and pruning; the control spine governs cross-domain compilation and orbit preservation.

canonical_fail_witness.description: obstruction_spine_ref is QA_OBSTRUCTION_STACK_CERT.v1 instead of QA_OBSTRUCTION_STACK_REPORT.v1
